title: Ukrainian Flaky Pastry with Garlic Stir Fry
description: A classic Ukrainian dish with a twist, combining flaky pastry with a savory garlic stir fry.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry and place on a baking sheet.
Bake the pastry for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the pastry is baking, heat the fry oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and stir-fry vegetables to the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add the ukrainian sausage to the pan and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Meanwhile, peel and chop the romantic potatoes into bite-sized pieces.
Add the potatoes to the pan and stir to combine with the garlic and vegetables.
Remove the pastry from the oven and let cool for 2-3 minutes.
Spoon the garlic stir fry onto the pastry and serve.
